verses.2: On the top of high places by the way,
verses.3: Beside the gates, at the entry of the city,
verses.6: Hear, for I will speak excellent things.
verses.8: All the words of my mouth are in righteousness.
verses.9: They are all plain to him who understands,
verses.10: Receive my instruction rather than silver,
verses.11: For wisdom is better than rubies.
verses.12: “I, wisdom, have made prudence my dwelling.
verses.13: The fear of the LORD is to hate evil.
verses.14: Counsel and sound knowledge are mine.
verses.17: I love those who love me.
verses.19: My fruit is better than gold, yes, than fine gold,
verses.20: I walk in the way of righteousness,
verses.21: that I may give wealth to those who love me.
verses.22: “The LORD possessed me in the beginning of his work,
verses.23: I was set up from everlasting, from the beginning,
verses.24: When there were no depths, I was born,
verses.25: Before the mountains were settled in place,
verses.26: while as yet he had not made the earth, nor the fields,
verses.27: When he established the heavens, I was there.
verses.28: when he established the clouds above,
verses.29: when he gave to the sea its boundary,
verses.30: then I was the craftsman by his side.
verses.32: “Now therefore, my sons, listen to me,
verses.34: Blessed is the man who hears me,
verses.35: For whoever finds me finds life,
verses.36: But he who sins against me wrongs his own soul.
